overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a character walking through an urban beach area resembling Venice Beach. The character moves from a narrow alley past a liquor store, crosses city streets, and emerges onto a sunny palm-lined beach promenade with a distinctive large sculpture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban alley with commercial buildings and dumpsters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow sidewalk next to brick buildings

entered.detail: red brick commercial building with flat roof
two green industrial dumpsters against the building wall
storefront with yellow signage and large windows
purple neon sign reading 'Logger' in the store window
tall palm tree on the sidewalk near the intersection
wooden utility pole with power lines

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow urban alley with brick buildings and green dumpsters on the left. A liquor store with neon signs becomes visible as the character approaches an intersection with palm trees.

events.description: character crosses the street at the marked crosswalk
bald pedestrian passes close to camera temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark pants standing near the crosswalk
bald man with glasses and scarf walking past the camera

entered.detail: paved road intersection with marked crosswalk lines
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
single-story blue commercial building with arched openings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses an urban intersection with traffic lights and crosswalks. A distinctive blue building becomes visible across the street. Pedestrians are present including a bald man who passes close to the camera, temporarily obscuring the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk adjacent to commercial buildings transitioning to park

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk
urban sidewalk opens up to beach promenade with grass and dense palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking and occasionally running along the sidewalk next to a blue building, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow top walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: bright blue building with multiple arches and columns, resembling a market or pavilion
corrugated metal fence running along the left side of the sidewalk
green grass lawn appearing beyond the blue building

segments.scene_description: Walking and running along a sidewalk next to a distinctive blue building with arches. The environment transitions from dense urban to more open park-like space with grass areas and numerous palm trees becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach promenade with sculpture and recreational areas

events.description: large rusted sculpture becomes prominent landmark on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza observing the beach environment and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: shirtless man in swim trunks walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians gathered near the large sculpture

entered.detail: tall abstract rust-colored metal sculpture with geometric cutouts
colorful umbrellas in red, yellow, green, and blue shading picnic tables
concrete tables and benches arranged on the promenade
distant view of the ocean horizon beyond the promenade
large ferris wheel visible in the far distance along the beach

segments.scene_description: The character explores a wide open beach promenade lined with dense palm trees. A large distinctive rust-colored sculpture dominates the left side of the plaza. Colorful beach umbrellas, picnic tables, and numerous pedestrians populate the area with the ocean and a distant ferris wheel visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined urban alleyway that gradually opens into a wide, sun-drenched beach promenade. It begins by navigating a narrow passage of brick buildings and green dumpsters, moving toward a liquor store with neon signs as the path meets a palm-lined intersection. As the camera crosses the street, the view is briefly obscured by a passing pedestrian before the scene shifts toward a distinctive blue arched building. The environment then transitions from dense city architecture to an open, park-like space with grassy areas and towering palm trees. Finally, the camera emerges onto a sprawling plaza featuring a large rust-colored sculpture, colorful beach umbrellas, and a distant ferris wheel overlooking the ocean.
